{# _vendor_tasks.html — Open tasks for a vendor card. Receives: vendor_id, vendor_tasks (list[RequisitionTask]), now_utc (datetime, via _base_ctx) Called by: vendor_tasks_partial, create_vendor_task_endpoint, complete_task_endpoint, delete_task_endpoint (vendor branch) Depends on: task_service.get_open_tasks_for_vendor_card #}

Tasks

{% if vendor_tasks %}
    {% for t in vendor_tasks %} {# Overdue/due-today via the shared task_due_state helper (per-user tz, calendar-day based) — NOT in-template `due_at <= now_utc` math, which flagged a task due earlier today as Overdue and bucketed on the UTC day. #} {% set _due_state = task_due_state(t, now_utc) %} {% set is_overdue = _due_state[0] %} {% set is_due_today = _due_state[1] %}
  • {{ t.title }} {% if t.due_at %} · {% if is_overdue %}Overdue ({{ t.due_at|fmtdate('%b %-d') }}){% elif is_due_today %}Due today{% else %}Due {{ t.due_at|fmtdate('%b %-d') }}{% endif %} {% endif %}
    • {% endfor %}
{% else %}

No open tasks.

{% endif %}
